description: Arquillian Container Test API provides annotations and helper APIs used to declare deployments, target containers, run modes, and protocols for Arquillian-managed integration tests. It lets tests coordinate container startup, deployment, and client-vs-container execution through contracts such as Deployment, RunAsClient, TargetsContainer, Deployer, and ContainerController.

Arquillian Container Test API provides annotations and helper APIs used to declare deployments, target containers, run modes, and protocols for Arquillian-managed integration tests. It lets tests coordinate container startup, deployment, and client-vs-container execution through contracts such as Deployment, RunAsClient, TargetsContainer, Deployer, and ContainerController.
